grant_title: 21st Century Community Learning Centers (21st CCLC) Program for Out-of-School-Time Programs
project_area: Out-of-school-time programs (before-school, afterschool, or summer) including academic remediation, enrichment activities, arts and cultural experiences, youth development, support services, physical activity, parental involvement, and literacy services for adult family members
demographic_requirements: Youth-focused programs targeting students in need of academic support, workforce development skills, and life skills, with services designed to complement school-day learning and foster positive, healthy choices
eligibility_summary: Open to local education agencies, non-profits, for-profits, community-based, and faith-based organizations operating in New Jersey. Programs must offer academic remediation/enrichment, youth development, and support services, and may include parental involvement and literacy services for adult family members.
